But this meeting is not easy. Akshay Kumar’s golden mask gangster army is already waiting to stop Yash before he can step inside the palace walls.

snippet.description:
"Holi Khele Masane Mein" a folk Holi Song sung by the renowned folk singer Malini Awasthi. Rooted in traditional Indian folk music, this unique Holi special is dedicated to Lord Shiva. It depicts the divine and mystical Holi played by Mahadev in the cremation grounds, where colors are replaced with sacred ash and bhasm.

Unlike conventional Holi party songs, this devotional Holi bhajan reflects the spiritual and intense form of Shiva — the ascetic, the destroyer, and the eternal yogi. Through powerful vocals and authentic folk composition, this song beautifully portrays the imagery of Bhasm Holi, spiritual detachment, and divine celebration beyond worldly colors.

If you are searching for Shiv Holi song, Malini Awasthi song, devotional Holi songs, Mahadev bhajan, or Shiv bhakti song, this track is a must-add to your playlist. Perfect for Maha Shivratri, Holi celebrations, bhajan sandhya, and devotional gatherings.

Experience a different shade of Holi — one of devotion, vairagya, and divine energy.
